rules.name: seniority_too_high
rules.prompt: Does this role clearly target senior, staff, lead, principal, architect, manager, or otherwise advanced-level software engineers?

rules.name: experience_too_high
rules.prompt: Does this role clearly require more than 4 years of professional software engineering experience?

rules.name: frontend_primary
rules.prompt: Is this role primarily focused on frontend development such as React, UI work, styling, design systems, or client-side web development?

rules.name: non_remote_or_relocation_required
rules.prompt: Is this job clearly NOT fully remote within the United States (for example: on-site, hybrid, location-restricted, or requires relocation)?

rules.name: contract_only
rules.prompt: Is it explicitly stated that this role is contract-only, temporary, freelance, or an internship?

rules.name: junior_or_entry_level
rules.prompt: Is this clearly a junior, entry-level, associate, new grad, or Software Engineer I role, or otherwise obviously targeted at early-career candidates?

rules.name: attainable_generalist_role
rules.prompt: Even if not explicitly labeled junior, does this role appear realistically attainable for an early-career software engineer based on its responsibilities and requirements?

rules.name: backend_primary
rules.prompt: Is this role primarily focused on backend development, APIs, services, databases, business logic, integrations, or server-side systems?

rules.name: full_stack_penalty
rules.prompt: Is this role clearly full-stack with meaningful frontend responsibilities, even if it is not primarily frontend?

rules.name: python_bonus
rules.prompt: Does this role explicitly use, require, or prefer Python?

rules.name: remote_confirmed
rules.prompt: Does this posting clearly indicate that the role is fully remote within the United States?

rules.name: full_time_confirmed
rules.prompt: Does this posting clearly indicate that the role is a full-time position?

rules.name: degree_flexible
rules.prompt: Does this job allow candidates without a bachelor's degree (for example: degree optional, preferred, or equivalent experience accepted)? Answer only 'true' or 'false'.

inactive_rules.name: internship_role
inactive_rules.prompt: Is this an internship or co-op position rather than a full-time role?

inactive_rules.name: database_work
inactive_rules.prompt: Does the role involve working with databases (SQL or NoSQL)?

inactive_rules.name: non_software_role
inactive_rules.prompt: Is this NOT a software engineering role (e.g., IT support, QA tester without coding, analyst, etc.)?

inactive_rules.name: devops_or_platform
inactive_rules.prompt: Is this primarily a DevOps, infrastructure, or platform engineering role rather than application development?
